title: Watch: There's a ceasefire in Lebanon - but the fighting hasn't stopped
summary_full: Israel and Hezbollah are still fighting in Lebanon despite a US-brokered ceasefire that began 12 days ago.
summary_public: Israel and Hezbollah are still fighting in Lebanon despite a US-brokered ceasefire that began 12 days ago.
